articles.description: The first Hydra node compatible with the Cardano mainnet was launched on May 11, according to developer Sebastian Nagel. Hydra is a layer2 scaling solution designed to improve scalability on the Cardano blockchain. Its launch came after several months of testing. According to its technical documentation, the protocol aims to increase transaction speed through low […]
